texto: I have had so many great moments, but I would have to say that dancing the Swan in 'Swan Lake' was such a unique and passionate experience for me. It was such bloody hard work, even at that very early age, that I would not want to try to replicate it again now.
explicacao: Orientação direta de William Kempe sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I have had so many great moments, but I would have to say that dancing the Swan in 'Swan Lake' wa…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, work, hard-work, útil em momentos de trabalho e hard-work.

frase_original: I have had so many great moments, but I would have to say that dancing the Swan in 'Swan Lake' was such a unique and passionate experience for me. It was such bloody hard work, even at that very early age, that I would not want to try to replicate it again now.
